must_detect.matched_text: Retention: verification copies are kept for 30 days then securely deleted; transactional logs (non-identifying) retained for audit for 5 years per ADGM FSRA guidance.

Naseem Capital ADGM Limited — DSAR and retention workflow under UAE PDPL and ADGM Data Protection Regulations 2021.
Scope: processing by the Controller for investor onboarding, SCA reporting, and already-announced issuer actions; no MNPI is gathered in this flow.
Contact channels: dpo@naseemcapital.ae (role mailbox) and public helpline 800 555 2100 for general queries; do not submit PII to the helpline.
Identity verification: a single local identifier may be requested; example Emirates ID: 784-1987-1234567-9 (checksum deemed invalid during review).
Company context: ADGM trade licence No. 0091234-A (sample, not valid) and registered office: P.O. Box 00000, Abu Dhabi Global Market Square, Abu Dhabi (generic).
Intake form fields (placeholders only): Name: __________; Passport No: __________; Phone: __________; Email: __________; Account/IBAN: AE00 0000 0000 0000 0000 000 (example not in use).
For DIFC counterparties and the fictitious Mina Dunes Exchange listings, we rely solely on public filings and SCA notices; insider or deal-room data is out of scope.
Special categories: family-origin information and biometric data are not required; if submitted inadvertently, they will be redacted before processing.
Retention: verification copies are kept for 30 days then securely deleted; transactional logs (non-identifying) retained for audit for 5 years per ADGM FSRA guidance.
Transfers: where onward transfer to a third country is necessary, we apply UAE PDPL transfer bases and ADGM adequate jurisdictions; otherwise, DPA clauses with processor Shamal Reef Services FZ-LLC apply.
DSAR response timeline: acknowledgment within 5 business days; substantive response within one month, subject to identity confirmation and scope limits.
Exclusions: this workflow does not include board minutes, private term sheets, or non-public issuer data; references to “insider lists” are illustrative only.
